name: Rustic Italian Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except cornmeal and egg white in bread machine pan according to manufacturer's directions. Process on dough setting.
2. Sprinkle an ungreased cookie sheet with cornmeal.
3. At the end of the dough cycle, remove dough from the machine and place it on a lightly floured surface. Punch down the dough. If the dough is sticky, knead in additional flour before shaping.
4. Shape the dough into a baguette-shaped loaf about 12 inches long. Place the loaf on the cornmeal-coated sheet. Cover; let rise in a warm place (80-85°F) for 20-25 minutes or until light and doubled in size.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F. Make one deep lengthwise slash on top of the loaf with a sharp knife. Brush the loaf with egg white.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25-35 minutes or until the loaf sounds hollow when lightly tapped.
Makes one, 12-slice loaf.
